name: Miner's Forge
description: A basic smelting forge for processing ore into ingots.

name: Forester's Workbench
description: A sturdy bench for processing timber and leather.

name: Mystic Altar
description: An arcane altar for enchanting and essence extraction.

name: Chef's Hearth
description: A cooking fire with iron grates for preparing food.

name: Engineer's Workshop
description: A complex workstation for assembling devices and consumables.

name: Pirate Claim Flag
description: Plant this flag to claim territory for your crew. Establishes a base.

name: Storage Chest
description: A locked chest for storing items. 20 slot capacity.

name: Reinforced Vault
description: A fortified vault with 60 slot capacity. Harder to break into.

name: Campfire
description: A simple campfire for resting and cooking basic food. Provides warmth buff.

name: Repair Anvil
description: Repair damaged equipment. Consumes materials based on item tier.

name: Dye Station
description: Change equipment colors using pigments and essences.

name: Ship Repair Dock
description: Repair ship hull and sails. Required for sea travel maintenance.

name: Advanced Forge
description: An upgraded forge for T5+ crafting. Smelts rare alloys.
buildMaterials: Mithril Ingot x5;Dragon Stone x2;Advanced Forge Plans x1

name: Arcane Sanctum
description: A powerful altar for T5+ enchanting and legendary essence work.
buildMaterials: Enchanted Stone x10;Void Crystal x3;Sanctum Blueprint x1

name: Grand Kitchen
description: A fully equipped kitchen for T5+ feast preparation.
buildMaterials: Hardwood x20;Mithril Grate x2;Grand Recipe Book x1
